title: Automatic scaling of dashboards
excerpt: When editing a dashboard, the widgets automatically scale to the size of the screen. However, in viewing mode, dashboards are fixed at the scale they were last edited. This means that if a dashboard owner opens a dashboa…

posts.author: gcaroe (Grace Caroe)
posts.cookedHtml:
When editing a dashboard, the widgets automatically scale to the size of the screen. However, in viewing mode, dashboards are fixed at the scale they were last edited. This means that if a dashboard owner opens a dashboard on a large monitor, and then a user wants to view it on a laptop screen, a large part of the dashboard will be cut off. Worse still, there is no functionality to scroll left and right on the dashboard, so the only way the user can view the whole dashboard is to zoom out in their browser to 50%, which makes the text barely legible.

I need dashboards to automatically scale to the size of the screen, even in viewer mode. Otherwise, this will create a massive problem for our users who work from home or want to present dashboards in meetings. Even the capacity to scroll within a dashboard would help a lot!
